name: @artale/pi-validate
description: Production readiness validator. Score projects on code, tests, docs, config, deploy. Inspired by MrE's system-validator-100.
readme:
# @artale/pi-validate

Production readiness validator. Score projects on code, tests, docs, config, deploy.

## Install
```bash
npm install -g @artale/pi-validate
```

## Tools
- **validate_project** — Validate production readiness with scores

## Commands
- `/validate` — Validation dashboard
